message:
🐛 Fix refresh spinner to match console speed and spin until data returns (#854)

Revert one-shot spin animation (animate-spin-once at 0.6s) back to
standard animate-spin (1s linear) that runs continuously while
refreshing. Matches the spinner speed used everywhere else in the
console and keeps spinning until the health check data comes back.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
